title: Goldman Sachs Just Told Its Wealthiest Clients to Buy the Crypto Dip — Here’s Why
description: The title of an invite-only client call that Goldman Sachs held in June 2020 was “US Economic Outlook & Implications of Current Policies for Inflation, Gold and Bitcoin.” The chief investment officer of the bank put together a slide that called Bitcoin a “conduit for illegal activity” and concluded that “a security whose appreciation is […]The post Goldman Sachs Just Told Its Wealthiest Clients to Buy the Crypto Dip — Here’s Why appeared first on ABC Money.
